name: academorix/localization
description: Multilingual substrate on top of Laravel's built-in localization. Owns four entities — PlatformLanguage (platform catalogue of BCP-47 locale tags with script + platform state, FK-referencing geography::Language + optionally geography::Country for regional variants), TenantLocale (per-tenant enabled locales with default + fallback + auto-translate policy), Translation (persistent DB cache of resolved key→value bindings per tenant + locale), TranslationJob (audit trail for async bulk-translation work). Resolves the caller's active locale from a 7-step precedence chain (query, header, user, tenant, Accept-Language, subdomain, app default). Decorates Laravel's Translator so `t()`, `__()`, `trans()`, `trans_choice()` transparently consult the DB cache before the filesystem. Ships #[Translatable] attribute for Eloquent property translation. Publishes 5 machine-translation drivers (OpenAI, Google, DeepL, AWS Translate, Azure) + a null driver for tests. RTL-aware. All ISO-639 + ISO-3166 metadata sourced from the geography module — no field duplication.

suggest.openai-php/laravel: Required by OpenAITranslatorDriver when the `openai` driver is used.
suggest.google/cloud-translate: Required by GoogleTranslatorDriver when the `google` driver is used.
suggest.deeplcom/deepl-php: Required by DeepLTranslatorDriver when the `deepl` driver is used.
suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Required by AwsTranslateDriver when the `aws-translate` driver is used.
